title: Compare shapes
description: Practice comparing shapes based on their number of sides, number of corners, and side-lengths.

hints:
The pentagon has $\green{5 \text { sides}}$.  

![A shape with 5 sides. The sides are numbered 1 through 5.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/6f1caa2d715943d4efe911e81652313d.png)

The rectangle has $\orange{4 \text{ sides}}$.  

![A shape with 4 sides. The sides are numbered 1 through 4.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/709b7b67957033364f489dc23547641a.png)

$\green5$ is more than $\orange4$.  
The pentagon has more sides.  

![A shape with 5 sides.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/867f528f4853c8eb5ddec27f6de409b2.png)

choices.content: The shapes have the same number of sides.

hints:
The triangle has $\red{3 \text{ sides}}$.  

![A shape with 3 sides. The sides are numbered 1 through 3.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/41a2ec24c50e0a7b49d80d37ec1a7e70.png)

The square has $\orange{4 \text{ sides}}$.    

![A shape with 4 sides. The sides are numbered 1 through 4.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/dddde1a26651edca7396f648e7dfd7ea.png)

$\orange4$ is more than $\red3$.  
The square has more sides.  

![A shape with 4 sides.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/20a82e9c5b310e01aa4142f3a1643385.png)

choices.content: The shapes have the same number of sides.

hints:
The pentagon has $\green{5 \text{ sides}}$.  

![A shape with 5 sides. The sides are numbered 1 through 5.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/95cec24854b2e1565001119810978528.png)

The triangle has $\orange{3 \text{ sides}}$.  

![A shape with 3 sides. The sides are numbered 1 through 3.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/65c41221cf9928dab457c6795523159e.png)

$\orange3$ is less than $\green5$.  
The triangle has fewer sides.  
![A shape with 3 sides.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b0a281fd13cb28ce065739bf81e523c5.png)

choices.content: The shapes have the same number of sides.

hints:
The hexagon has $\green{6 \text{ sides}}$.  

![A shape with 6 sides. The sides are numbered 1 through 6.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/f7515549626bb1b1f5b37b80c22950cefb8f631d)

The rectangle has $\blue{4 \text{ sides}}$.  

![A shape with 4 sides. The sides are numbered 1 through 4.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/92f9b54b34dff665cf11eb7e61950e4a.png)

$\blue4$ is less than $\green6$.  
The rectangle has fewer sides.  

![A shape with 4 sides.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/ca3012159d57a585fdd40b7cee42cf1a.png)

choices.content: The shapes have the same number of sides.

hints:
The square has $\blueD{4\text { sides}}$.  

![A square. The sides are numbered 1 through 4.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/1d43105e8581f564b1d9c45a41828cb638db092f)

The rectangle has $\purpleD{4\text { sides}}$.  

![A rectangle. The sides are numbered 1 through 4.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/8c5e0e0bdd209e91924b7f47b5a177043db207c5)
The shapes have the same number of sides.

choices.content: The shapes have the same number of sides.

hints:
The rectangle has $\green{4 \text{ corners}}$.  

![A rectangle. The corners are numbered 1 through 4.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/50fb51737f29a69f915432a1dc105a45.png)

The triangle has $\blue{3 \text{ corners}}$.  

![A triangle. The corners are numbered 1 through 3.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/5bb8f1eb798699c8a23442c3bb08afa2.png)

$\green4$ is more than $\blue3$.  
The rectangle has more corners.  

![A rectangle.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/4c519a7098982ab0a733a3e0eb24d502.png)

choices.content: The shapes have the same number of corners.

hints:
The pentagon has $\orange{5 \text{ corners}}$.  

![A pentagon. The corners are numbered 1 through 5.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/37633380f519d52bc3abc86faf052aa6.png)

The hexagon has $\orange{6 \text{ corners}}$.  

![A hexagon. The corners are numbered 1 through 6.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/308963ddfbd82cba2dfb323f3e737004.png)

$\orange6$ is more than $\orange5$.  
The hexagon has more corners.  
  
![A hexagon.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/6a87fe1d53101c2b717252f5b0fc6491.png)

choices.content: The shapes have the same number of corners.

hints:
This triangle has $\green{3 \text{ corners}}$.

choices.content: The shapes have the same number of corners.

hints:
The square has $\red{4 \text{ corners}}$.  

![A square. The corners are numbered 1 through 4.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/a488304462b687981b12208c91644943.png)

The ellipse has no corners.  

![An ellipse.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/cfb57938ba1664e64da47267f1dc6bf4.png)

The hexagon has $\blue{6 \text{ corners}}$.  

![A hexagon. The corners are numbered 1 through 6.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/4000f8f65f01869ff226f9398300200d.png)

The circle has no corners.  

![A circle.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b531aee718bf1af446cd1007f3cdc6b8.png)

This shape is not round.  It has $8$ corners.  
![An octogon.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/e37b63c3472498cce98890925ea81077.png)

The circle is round.  
![A circle.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/6c6ee60ced6c49892e7401f45eb084b8.png)

The pentagon is not round.  It has $5$ corners.  
![A pentagon.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/967e3d6cbb95b0d0bc3356d6507749f1.png)

The circle is round.  
![A circle.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/74d1760dce0d9d81d664be92d684149c.png)

The rectangle is not round.  It has $4$ corners.  
![A rectangle.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/041a0f4b2fdd755f9f489863fadd7cbc.png)

The circle is round.  
![A circle.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/bc4a2bd7dadebe55d65c3158c311bac1.png)

The square is not round.  It has $4$ corners.  
![A square.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/639f0042f8bbd0ac5635cbea86692f99.png)

The circle is round.  
![A circle.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/17fde5a5baab21456e53eae34096c092.png)

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which shape has sides that are all the same length?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
The rectangle has $\blue{2 \text{ long sides}}$ and $\pink{2 \text{ short sides}}$.  
![A rectangle.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/48a9359e57f847580688b0adad586554.png)

The rhombus sides are  $\red{\text{all the same length}}$.  
![A rhombus.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/6c26be4e3dffff3cdb75c4fdb884bd69.png)

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which shape has sides that are all the same length?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
The rectangle has $\pink{2 \text{ long sides}}$ and $\orange{2 \text{ short sides}}$.  

![A rectangle.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/6aae80ceccd593976a2476a8c90932ad.png)

The pentagon sides are $\red{\text{all the same length}}$.  

![A pentagon.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/4a9b9d05cd15d51af6d152ec7bac4d49.png)

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which shape has $4$ sides of the same length?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
The rectangle has $\pink{2 \text{ long sides}}$ and $\blue{2 \text{ short sides}}$.   
![A rectangle.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/bc805d784b0de58864535b5a4c06e18b.png)

The square sides are $\green{\text{all the same length}}$.

![A square.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/f2c62168ccc40a207bbbff9caff6edb8.png)

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which shape has $4$ sides of the same length?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
The rectangle has $\blue{2 \text{ long sides}}$ and $\pink{2 \text{ short sides}}$.  
![A rectangle.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/a7452c18b8a59c327ef3e94f69d60e25.png)

The square sides are $\green{\text{all the same length}}$.
![A square.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/3339a18cdaf9e73ecf97f8beb6a58c47.png)
